// storeInfoInHeader o teya oshiholelwa sha pewa moheda ya HTTP ya okuninga oshiholelwa sha li po sha nyolwa pehala lya oshityape sha pewa.
Oshityape shi shi landula oshityape sha oshiholelwa: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Osha tekelwa moheda ya 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', sha landulathana.
Oshiholelwa sha lesha osha leshwa ko oshikwatelwa sha omukwashigwana.
Ngele oshityape sha oshiholelwa sha pewa osha li sha nyanyukidhwa, oheda ya okuninga oshiholelwa oya adhika oku na sho. Ngele oshike osha ya po, oshityape osha galula oheda ya oshiholelwa ya oshikwatelwa osho sha li sho, oshike oshike osha ningwa.

Args:

infoType (string): Oshityape sha oshiholelwa sha tekelwa moheda.
infoContent (string): Oshiholelwa sha tekelwa moheda.
header (map[string]string): Oheda ya oshiholelwa ya okuninga oshiholelwa sha li po.

Returns:

map[string]string: Oheda ya oshiholelwa ya okuninga oshiholelwa oya adhika, na oshiholelwa sha tekelwa mo.func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {

// Omwaalu wu nyengwe nokii ngeenditho dha CBC.
Ookii dha omapelele dha pewa odha le po (>= 64 omapelele) koomadhiladhilitho gha AES na DES.
Hanga omadhiladhilitho limwe tu u gandje osho osho oku longitha oshipelele shokii dha pewa odhi thikana nokule nomolwa okupelele kwa hala.
Ino hanga omadhiladhilitho molwa okupelele kokii.
Gandula omwaalu wu nyengwe, IV (initialization vector), nokii dha longithwa ku nyenga.
Oondjendjo:
- okii: Omapelele oku gandja okii dha nyenga.
- omwaalu: Omwaalu wu nyengwe.
Gandula:
- Omwaalu wu nyengwe, IV, nokii dha longithwa ku nyenga. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)func encryptData(key, data []byte) ([]byte, []byte, []byte, error) {

/* Generate a URL for querying user information based on a given API URL and a user ID. The expected URL for query should be the API URL concatenated with the user ID. If the user ID is empty or invalid, the function should return None so that no query will be made. Examples: - getURLForQuery("https://example.com/api/user", "aBc123") returns 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123' - getURLForQuery"https://example.com/api/user", "") returns NULL @param api_url: The API to query user info. @param user_id: The user ID to invalid query. @return The URL for query. */

/* Omba oshiningwa nokii ngeyi AES na modhi ya CBC.
Oshikuto shokii osha pewa osha lepo (>= 64 omaayiti). Shitapo oshikuto shokii osha pewa osho shi shikifana nokule pokukwatelwa.
Gandja oshiningwa osha mbikwa, IV (initialization vector), nokii osha shiwa kombinga yokumba.

Oshigongi:
- okii: Omaayiti oku gandja okii yokumba (okunini 16 omaayiti).
- oshiningwa: Oshiningwa osha mbikwa.

Osha gandjwa:
- (oshiningwa osha mbikwa, iv, aesKey): Oshiningwa osha mbikwa, IV, nokii osha shiwa kombinga yokumba. */
